name: Charlizard
lore: Born in a discount volcano, this creature smolders with mediocre intensity.
look: Orange lizard with mismatched flames on its tail

name: Blazetoad
lore: Assembled from spare lighter parts at a sketchy bazaar in the fire dimension.
look: Red bird made of barely-warm embers and regret

name: Infernape-ish
lore: Expelled from flame school for excessive smoke production.
look: Scaly creature with fire coming out of wrong places

name: Volcanion't
lore: Sets things on fire, but forgets to turn itself off afterwards.
look: Canine with a perpetually smoldering coat

name: Pyroar-ish
lore: Rejected by premium fire monsters for using generic brand flames.
look: Salamander with flickering LED flames glued on

name: Torchicken
lore: Burns with the heat of a thousand clearance-bin candles.
look: Small dragon with suspiciously plastic-looking wings

name: Emberino
lore: Molded from factory-reject molten rock during off-peak hours.
look: Flaming ape that's more smoke than substance

name: Flameagle
lore: Sparks fly whenever it moves, usually causing insurance claims.
look: Toad with lava lamp aesthetic

name: Scorchpup
lore: Warm to the touch, but not hot enough to cook instant noodles.
look: Eagle with fire trail made of party streamers

name: Cindersnail
lore: Its flames flicker uncertainly, as if running on bootleg fuel.
look: Dog with a pilot light instead of proper flames

name: Pokachu
lore: Charged to the fullest at a chinese factory after ripping off all trademarked features.
look: Yellow rat with a battery stuffed into its back

name: Glacius
lore: Perpetually frozen in a state of budget-tier cryogenics.
look: Blue fox with icicle fur that melts in summer

name: Frozeon
lore: Made from recycled snow cones and discount ice packs.
look: Penguin wrapped in cheap aluminum foil for effect

name: Snowrunt
lore: So cold it makes other ice monsters feel warm by comparison.
look: White bear with snowflake stickers peeling off

name: Chilltopus
lore: Melts slightly in direct sunlight but refuses to admit it.
look: Crystalline bird that looks like plastic packaging

name: Iceicube
lore: Formed when someone left the freezer door open too long.
look: Frozen rodent in a state of permanent brain freeze

name: Blizzardbird
lore: Colder than a customer service rep's heart at a returns desk.
look: Seal covered in frosting instead of frost

name: Frostbyte
lore: Its icy exterior conceals an even icier interior made of spite.
look: Wolf withicicle teeth from a dollar store

name: Coldpanda
lore: Banned from all ice skating rinks for being too slippery.
look: Rabbit with cotton-ball snow attached haphazardly

name: Winterfox
lore: Crystallized from the tears of disappointed toy collectors.
look: Panda dipped in budget-tier ice cream

name: Gengarbage
lore: Lurks in the clearance aisle, feeding on expired coupons and broken dreams.
look: Purple ghost with visible stitching from assembly

name: Darkeevee
lore: Spawned from the shadow of a legitimate monster, but cheaper.
look: Black cat with a darkness so dark it's copyright infringement

name: Shadowmoth
lore: Too dark to see properly, which may be a manufacturing defect.
look: Moth made of torn shadows and fabric scraps

name: Nightmarebird
lore: Exists in the void between authentic and counterfeit.
look: Bird shrouded in discount Halloween decoration material

name: Gloomander
lore: Whispers unsettling truths about shipping delays.
look: Lizard painted with the cheapest black paint available

name: Duskbunny
lore: Born from the darkness under a vending machine.
look: Rabbit with ears that cast suspicious shadows

name: Voidcat
lore: So edgy it cuts itself on its own aesthetic.
look: Fox with void-colored fur that sheds existential dread

name: Eclipsewolf
lore: Haunts thrift stores and garage sales exclusively.
look: Slug leaving a trail of darkness and sadness

name: Murkrowbar
lore: Darker than the terms and conditions nobody reads.
look: Wolf with glowing red eyes powered by AAA batteries

name: Grimslug
lore: Manifests only when warranty periods expire.
look: Amorphous blob that shifts to avoid quality inspection

name: Zapados
lore: Generates static electricity but forgot to include a grounding wire.
look: Yellow bird crackling with visible static charges

name: Thunderchu
lore: Thunders loudly but neighbors keep filing noise complaints.
look: Electric mouse with lightning bolt decals

name: Volteon
lore: Assembled during a lightning storm at a questionable facility.
look: Blue dragon with storm clouds as hair

name: Stormpidgey
lore: Sparks fly from its body like a malfunctioning power outlet.
look: Beaver generating sparks from rubbing cheap fur

name: Boltbeaver
lore: Rides clouds that are two firmware updates behind.
look: Rat with perpetually shocked expression

name: Shockrat
lore: Charged with atmospheric electricity and petty theft.
look: Ape riding a motorcycle made of thunder

name: Rainthundra
lore: Its lightning strikes look impressive but void all warranties.
look: Ninja frog with shuriken made of electrons

name: Cycloneape
lore: Born from a storm cloud that failed quality control.
look: Toad with raindrop patterns painted on

name: Lightninja
lore: Rumbles ominously, mostly due to digestive issues.
look: Bird with tornado wings spinning the wrong direction

name: Tempestoad
lore: Contains 30% more ozone depletion than brand-name storm monsters.
look: Legendary bird but from the outlet store

name: Rockachu
lore: Carved from discount granite during a going-out-of-business sale.
look: Brown mouse with pebbles glued to its body

name: Groundhog
lore: Solid as a rock, specifically the kind that crumbles easily.
look: Actual groundhog that wandered onto the roster

name: Boulderbear
lore: Dug up from a construction site's reject pile.
look: Bear made of boulders held together with hope

name: Sandshrew-ish
lore: Made from compressed sediment and broken promises.
look: Orange pangolin with sand constantly falling off

name: Mudkipster
lore: Its rocky exterior hides a mostly hollow interior.
look: Blue creature dripping mud continuously

name: Digletdown
lore: Fossilized disappointment from the Knockoff Era.
look: Mole that dug its way out of concept art

name: Stonesnake
lore: Heavy, dense, and somehow still overpriced.
look: Snake with scales that are literally tiny rocks

name: Terrawolf
lore: Erodes faster than its resale value.
look: Wolf with earthy brown fur and actual dirt

name: Claymore
lore: Minerals included: calcium, regret, and questionable additives.
look: Sword with googly eyes and stubby legs

name: Quartzbat
lore: Earthbound not by choice, but due to weight distribution issues.
look: Bat with crystalline wings that chip easily

name: Garbador
lore: Oozes a mysterious substance banned in 47 countries.
look: Purple garbage pile with eyes

name: Toxicroak-ish
lore: Toxic personality matches its toxic composition.
look: Toad that's clearly been dipped in toxic waste

name: Venomander
lore: Brewed in a vat labeled 'definitely not hazardous waste'.
look: Salamander with questionable purple spots

name: Sludgepuff
lore: Its poison is non-FDA approved and probably shouldn't exist.
look: Pink puffball leaking suspicious fluids

name: Poisonpineco
lore: Seeps through containers due to poor quality control.
look: Pinecone with venomous needles, somehow

name: Acidchu
lore: Contains toxins not found on any periodic table.
look: Yellow mouse covered in biohazard symbols

name: Vipereon
lore: Smells like regret mixed with industrial runoff.
look: Snake that's 60% poison by volume

name: Toxicowl
lore: Poison type, but the poison is mostly just bad vibes.
look: Owl with unsettling green glow

name: Grimerat
lore: Banned from public transportation for obvious reasons.
look: Rat with plague doctor aesthetic but cheaper

name: Plaguefly
lore: Its very existence violates several environmental treaties.
look: Fly buzzing around expired products

name: Lumineon't
lore: Glows with the intensity of a 40-watt knockoff bulb.
look: Fish that doesn't glow nearly enough

name: Glowth
lore: Radiates questionable photons from an unlicensed source.
look: Feline with LED strips poorly hidden in fur

name: Radiantpuff
lore: Bright enough to see, dim enough to be disappointing.
look: Pink puffball emanating holy-ish light

name: Holychu
lore: Illuminates the path to mediocrity with off-brand luminance.
look: Golden mouse with low-wattage divine aura

name: Dawnbird
lore: Shines like a beacon of acceptable quality standards.
look: Bird at dawn, or maybe just poorly lit

name: Brighteon
lore: Its glow attracts moths and regretful purchases.
look: Beige evolution with sparkle mode enabled

name: Celestisloth
lore: Certified 'good enough' by no recognized authority.
look: Sloth radiating minimal celestial energy

name: Shimmerdog
lore: Light element but made from heavy compromises.
look: Dog with glow-in-the-dark paint applied unevenly

name: Auralize
lore: Flickers when nobody's looking, definitely not haunted.
look: Dragon-like creature with shimmering scales from craft store

name: Prismowl
lore: Brightness settings stuck at 'barely adequate'.
look: Owl with prismatic feathers that are definitely plastic

name: Darkhollow
lore: Emerged from the gap between expectation and reality.
look: Duck-shaped absence of existence

name: Abyssduck
lore: Contains nothing, but packages it suspiciously well.
look: Duck swimming in literal nothingness

name: Voideon
lore: Exists in the space where refunds go to die.
look: Dark purple evolution of emptiness

name: Nullachu
lore: An absence of quality given physical form.
look: Yellow mouse but voided out

name: Emptyspace
lore: Hollow inside, hollow outside, hollow all the way through.
look: Spatial rift with adorable eyes

name: Nothingmon
lore: The void stares back, unimpressed with what it sees.
look: Creature made entirely of missing textures

name: Blackhowl
lore: Manifests from the emptiness of unfulfilled promises.
look: Wolf howling into the abyss, made of abyss

name: Erasewolf
lore: Literally nothing special, which is its defining trait.
look: Rat that exists in negative space

name: Dimensionrat
lore: Born when someone tried to delete a file but only corrupted it.
look: Portal with legs and a concerning smile

name: Portalbug
lore: Its emptiness is somehow still overstuffed with disappointment.
look: Bug made from the gaps between reality
